reference_common_threads.colour: 4 of 5 dark or mixed. 2-3 colours max. One accent used sparingly. No background gradients.
reference_common_threads.typography: All use premium/paid sans-serifs. Heading sizes 8-15vw. Tight negative letter-spacing. Light/regular weight (not bold). Fluid vw-based sizing.
reference_common_threads.animation: Scroll-triggered text reveals universal. Per-word or per-line splitting. Custom easing curves. Slow transitions (0.5-2s). All respect prefers-reduced-motion.
reference_common_threads.spacing: Extremely generous. Section padding 80-168px. Content never cramped. Whitespace IS the premium signal.
reference_common_threads.portfolio: Video/motion standard. Autoplay MP4s or sticky stacking cards. No static screenshots.
reference_common_threads.navigation: Minimal. Logo + CTA visible. Full menu behind hamburger.

trends_to_adopt: Kinetic/motion typography — variable fonts reacting to scroll
CSS scroll-driven animations (animation-timeline: scroll()) for GPU performance
View Transitions API for page transitions (Next.js experimental)
Purposeful micro-interactions — every animation answers a user question
Serif revival — consider serif accent for editorial gravitas (one reference pairing: display serif + geometric sans)
trends_to_avoid: AI-generated stock imagery — use real project screenshots and video captures
Decorative animations that don't serve function
Chatbot widgets and live chat popups
archive_differentiation_notes: No same-industry entries in archive. This is the first digital agency site. Full creative freedom.
design_constraints: Dark mode foundation — all 5 designs must use a dark background as default
Maximum 3 colours (one dark base, one neutral, one accent) — separation comes from whitespace, not colour changes
Heading font sizes must use vw units and exceed 6vw on desktop for hero headings
Navigation must be minimal — logo + one CTA button visible, everything else behind a hamburger menu
Portfolio section must include motion — either autoplay video thumbnails or scroll-driven card animation, never static image grids
No section may use a coloured background band — all section separation via whitespace and typography scale
Transitions must be slow (minimum 0.4s) with custom cubic-bezier easing, not generic ease-in-out
anti_patterns: 3-column card grid with icon + title + 2-line description (the 'services grid' cliche)
'Get Your Free Quote' or 'Click Here' as CTA text
Pill-shaped tags in a horizontal wrap
Full-width coloured CTA banner between sections
Trust badges in a horizontal strip with checkmark icons
Hamburger menu sliding in from the right with a full-screen overlay (must be more creative)
Static screenshot grid for portfolio (must use video or scroll-driven motion)
Generic ease-in-out or ease transitions (must use custom cubic-bezier curves)
Bold weight headings (references all use light/regular 300-500 weight)
Google Fonts body text at default sizing (must use fluid vw/clamp units)
Horizontal logo strip of client logos
Section dividers using coloured background bands or horizontal rules
Stats counter section with big numbers and labels (the '10+ Years / 50+ Clients' cliche)
Testimonial carousel with quote marks and star ratings in a card
